title: calpidia excelsa
intro: Calpidia excelsa, also known as the "thorn apple" or "Datura inoxia", is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, Solanaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of alkaloids that have been used to treat a range of conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Calpidia excelsa include its ability to act as an antispasmodic, an anti-inflammatory, and a sedative, making it useful for treating anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. Herbal preparations of Calpidia excelsa can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although caution should be exercised when using the plant due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
